creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #4)
okay, nymphrpc is being built with c++11, while the new version of poco uses stuff from c++14 or later, such as underlying_type_t.
Seems like that it's broken since 1.12.5: https://github.com/MayaPosch/NymphRPC/issues/9
People said that it'll work with c++14, so I'll try that.
